title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump seeks support on Hormuz as he sets sights on Cuba
summary_full: U.S. President Donald Trump's appeals that allies help the U.S. secure the Strait of Hormuz seem to have received a less than enthusiastic response.
summary_public: U.S. President Donald Trump's appeals that allies help the U.S. secure the Strait of Hormuz seem to have received a less than enthusiastic response.
